channel.title: scale on Articles, Translations, and Blog
channel.description: Recent content in scale on Articles, Translations, and Blog

item.title: Review: Have you tried turning it off and on again?
item.description: This is the LISA2017 conference talk review I wrote for their official blog. Just saving a copy here in case they decide to rework their blog and content disappears or something. Submitted by ipesin on November 7, 2017 - 11:38 am When you attend a talk that starts with a Google engineer asking, “What would happen if all of the machines you are running on restarted right now?” you might get really worried.

item.title: Links: 4th Sep
item.description: This week: technology links and a chart with sunlight hours.
